verifier: onyx_visual_verifier (Playwright, emulated phone+desktop; personal phone OUT of loop)
status: fix complete in working tree; DEPLOY in progress (this session = single deployer)
body:
0n1x RAIL — rhinogent delete-sync (twin-chat pillar). Verified by our own headless visual-verifier (Playwright; phone OUT of the loop). Baseline: FAIL 8/2.

ROOT CAUSE: delete WRITES to Supabase fine; the RECEIVING device never reconciles. Fix target = device-B reconcile on load, NOT the delete write.
  - vanishes_on_B  FAIL: thread deleted on A still on B after 6 reloads/49s
  - no_resurrection FAIL: thread deleted while B offline resurrects on B reopen

FIX (complete in working tree, chat-sync.ts + chat-matrix.tsx; needs DEPLOY):
  1. Tombstone not row-delete: deleted_at + empty-title marker; reconcileHistory treats tombstone/absence as authoritative delete; no-backfill (forget map entry) kills resurrection.
  2. Auto-title new chats from first message's first sentence, deduped by chat_id.
  3. New chat = unique chat_id + wallet + agent + unique name, synced cross-device.
  4. Remove the one-click X delete on sidebar rows.
  5. Fix drag-to-delete + identity-deletion warning ("deletes this chat AND its agent identity").
  6. Network page (/census) white/bright: dark look comes from HARDCODED near-black hex, not theme tokens. Swap for var(--surface) (or #ffffff) + darken on-canvas strokes/text for contrast:
     - network-grid.tsx L83 ctx.fillStyle "#0a0d16"->surface; L154 container background "#0a0d16"->surface; darken grid dots.
     - flow-graph-2d.tsx L113-114 gradient stops "#0d0d10"/"#060607"->light; L271 container "#060607"->surface; darken nodes/edges.
     - flow-graph.tsx L476 container "#060607"->surface; L479 radial "#0d0d0f/#060607"->light; L489 tooltip "#18191a"+light text -> light bg + dark text.
     - grep each file for rgba(234,234,234 / #eaeaea / color:"#fff" and darken to var(--foreground), else labels invisible on white.
  7. Mint requires login.

DEPLOY DISCIPLINE: single deployer only; .nojekyll must survive (else Jekyll strips _next/ JS = dead site, hit 3x); clear rhino_pages UU 0n1x.json conflict FIRST; post-deploy assert /_next/*.js = 200.

ACCEPTANCE GATE: re-run onyx_visual_verifier -> 8/2 must become 10/0 (vanishes_on_B + no_resurrection flip to PASS). Nothing launches on the twin-chat pillar until green.
